name: write_noc_solution
full_help:
write_noc_solution

Description: 
Write Solution To JSON File

Syntax: 
write_noc_solution  -file <arg> [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  -file       Output Solution File In JSON Format
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
NOC

arguments.description: Output Solution File In JSON Format
Suspend message limits during command execution
